calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-02-2018 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance or objection filed, the Court ordered the case dismissed pursuant to CRC 3.1385. Judge: TERI L. JACKSON; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-13-2018 Continued To Oct-02-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jan-24-2018 Off Calendar

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-25-2018 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Mar-27-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-12-2017 Set For Trial On Jan-29-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Jun-12-2017 Off Calendar

Notice Of Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Jun-06-2017 Continued To Jun-13-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514

MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Jun-06-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Attorney Robert N. Weaver for Defendant Douglas Kip Wong the moving party.
Attorey Robert H. Peterson for Plaintiff Pui Ying Wong Pon the opposing party.

After hearing arguments from both parties in the matter of DEFENDANT DOUGLAS WONG'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT, DEFAULT JUDGMENT and LEAVE TO DEFEND.

The Court rules as follows:

The Defendant is to submit a proposed order, present it to the opposing side for approval according to CRC 3.1312(b); along with the letter from his Physician that was requested by the Court by noon on Friday, June 9, 2017. The Court will then confirm the tentative ruling as it stands.
The prove up scheduled for June 8, 2017 in department 514 is to be continued until June 13, 2017 in department 514 at 9:00am. Then subject to the Court executing the above order, the prove up will then become moot.
Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk J. Rumsey, Not Recorded. (501)
